name: AutoFactory approval mode
description: WHETHER human approvals gate the chain. yolo = no gates, runs unattended (default). risk-threshold = gate the configured steps only when the research agent's risk_score meets the auto-factory-risk-threshold flag. always = gate the configured steps on every run. Compiled with auto-factory-approval-gates (where) and auto-factory-risk-threshold (sensitivity).

variations.name: Yolo
variations.description: No gates; the chain runs unattended.

variations.name: Risk threshold
variations.description: Gate the configured steps when risk_score >= the threshold flag (fail-closed on unknown risk).

variations.name: Always
variations.description: Gate the configured steps on every run.
